programme.desc: Sandra and Ann's last-minute change of budget keeps the Rodriguezes on their toes in Alicante. The Aldertons help Gill and Stephen to find their dream pad in Calp.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Frankie the Chihuahua plays it cool when he meets best friends Paulette and Jackie. And can glamorous poodle cross Lola live up to five-year-old Violet's expectations.

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: Tense thriller from Russell T Davies. Clive and Leo go face-to-face on a night of terror, while George embarks on an adventure that will have terrible consequences.

programme.title: All of Us Strangers
programme.desc: Andrew Scott and Paul Mescal star in Andrew Haigh's haunting romance about a lonely screenwriter who gets the chance to talk to his dead parents as he starts a new relationship.

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Gypsy learns that her ex, Ryan, will be listed as her baby's legal father until a court-ordered paternity test is completed. And Ryan's own social media gossiping isn't helping.

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Gypsy and Ken anxiously await the results of their paternity test, and interest on social media is just as high too. To get a break from the scrutiny, Gypsy plans a babymoon trip.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In Atlanta, Gordon helps first-time restaurant owners Richard and Jorge, whose establishment is in trouble due to their constant fighting, poor food and bad vibes.

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Romantic drama with Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu. Anna realises how much things have changed for her. As David wrestles with his feelings, Susan encourages him to face his fears.

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Series finale of Jack Thorne's romantic drama with Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu. Both Anna and David try to find a fresh start, but will their paths lead them back to each other.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Norfolk, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien meet upcycler and bike enthusiast Simon. Their finds include a filing cabinet, a trunk and a classic bicycle.

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier and Lilith practise their parenting skills on Carla's precocious six-year-old son and plan to take him to a fancy restaurant, which annoys Carla.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam dates Erin, an exercise fan who exhausts him with her dedication to athletics and outdoor pursuits. Rebecca promotes Norm's decorating business.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier and a pregnant Lilith move to the wilderness. Woody must take his first holiday in ages.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra invites her divorced parents over for Thanksgiving. When Ray walks in on them making love, he and Debra mistakenly assume that they're getting back together.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's jealous when Marie starts treating Robert better than him.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's parents ask Ray to give their son Peter some tips on dating. Debra throws a cocktail party, but Ray isn't impressed by the guest list.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne's engagement to Donny upsets Niles, but Peppy from Café Nervosa provides a pick-me-up. Frasier keeps getting Faye's name wrong.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: In the concluding part of the sixth season finale, will any of the Crane men sort out their romantic problems.

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett wake up to find themselves handcuffed together in a locked cellar, with no recollection of how they came to be there.

programme.title: Castle
